title: Umi Walking With a Candle
about: Umi Walking With a Candle refers to a GIF of the bunny character Umi from the Steam indie horror game Rental nervously walking down a dark hallway with a candle. Many who saw the GIF at first mistakenly believed that it was from the game Animal Crossing. It went viral on Twitter / X in 2024 and 2025 due to a series of GIF caption posts, which used the GIF to represent being uncomfortable or nervous in a given situation. In the following weeks, many X users began parodying the tweets that used the GIF earnestly, due to a widely held perception that many of the uncomfortable situations posed in them weren't as scarring as the users had suggested.
origin:
On March 7th, 2024, the indie horror game Rental was released on Steam,[1] developed by Lonely House, also known as @sukinapan on X.[2] Steam user y⛧u shared a GIF from the game to the Steam Community[12] page for Rental, showing the game's protagonist, Umi, a bunny, walking down a dark corridor with a candle.

On March 8th, X[3] user @rundry tweeted the GIF and captioned it, "How it feels to stay up past 11pm." Over one year, the tweet received over 112,000 likes and is currently the first known post to use the GIF memetically online.
